posts.title: Building tikho.me — a static blog with no framework
posts.excerpt: How this blog works: a static frontend on S3 + CloudFront, a small Python Lambda for likes and comments, and the fixes that made refreshes, routing and regression checks feel solid.

posts.title: Building a self-service platform on Kubernetes with Operators, Karpenter and Kyverno
posts.excerpt: A concept for building a self-service internal developer platform on Kubernetes — using a custom operator to manage projects and environments, Karpenter for on-demand node provisioning, and Kyverno to transparently handle pod scheduling without touching developer workloads.
